title: 35 Pcs Gold Star Cupcake Toppers Glitter Star Cake Topper Gold Stars Decorations Cupcake Picks Cake Decorations for Party Birthday Baby Shower Wedding Bridal Gender Reveal Supplies (Mixed Size)
features: 【Package Included】You will receive 35 gold star cupcake toppers in four sizes: Extra Large Star: 18.5 x 8.5 cm / 7.3 x 3.35 inches, Large Star: 17 x 6 cm / 6.7 x 2.36 inches, Medium Star: 13.5 x 3.7 cm / 5.3 x 1.46 inches, Small Star: 10.5 x 1.8 cm / 4.13 x 0.7 inches. This generous quantity of star toppers is perfect for your various decorating needs

【Premium Materials】These star cupcake toppers are made from high-quality gold cardstock and bamboo, making them durable and resistant to bending or deformation. These gold star party decorations are safe to place on cakes, cupcakes, ice cream, fruit, pies, desserts, cheese, or any other dishes or appetizers you want to decorate

【Easy to Use】These glittering star cupcake toppers picks come pre-assembled and ready to use, saving you time. Simply insert the star gold cupcake toppers into your cakes or cupcakes. Adjust the height for optimal effect

【Versatile Uses】Featuring a unique, personalized star-themed design, these gold star cake toppers are perfect for cupcake decorations at weddings, engagement parties, bridal showers, birthdays, and more. Star cake topper will make your cupcakes more attractive and add a touch of fun to your party. You can also use the glitter star cake toppers on ice cream, fruit, cookies, and other desserts
【Warm Tips】Our star cake decorations are for decorative purposes only and are not edible. Please ensure star cake topper is not used in high-temperature environments, such as ovens or microwaves
